name: Card of Sacrifice
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>捨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>す</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>て<ruby lang="jp"><rb>身</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>札</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Draw 2 cards, if the combined ATK of all your face-up Attack Position monsters (minimum 2) is less than the ATK of your opponent's face-up monster with the lowest ATK. You cannot Summon or change Battle Position the turn you activate this card.
eff: Draw 2 cards, if the combined ATK of all your face-up Attack Position monsters (minimum 2) is less than the ATK of your opponent's face-up monster with the lowest ATK. You cannot Summon or change Battle Position the turn you activate this card.
